scripts.types:worker: wrangler types src/worker-env.d.ts --env-interface WorkerEnv --include-runtime false --strict-vars false
scripts.check:worker-types: wrangler types src/worker-env.d.ts --env-interface WorkerEnv --include-runtime false --strict-vars false --check
scripts.typecheck: npm run check:worker-types && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json
